title: Transformers (2007)
description: Humanity becomes caught in a war between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons after a teenager discovers a powerful alien artifact tied to Earth’s fate.

title: Bumblebee
description: On the run from Cybertron’s war, Bumblebee finds refuge on Earth and forms a heartfelt friendship with a teenage girl while protecting the planet from new threats.

title: Transformers: Animated
description: A younger, more comedic take on the Transformers universe where Optimus Prime and his small Autobot team defend Detroit from Megatron and other Decepticons.

title: Transformers: Prime
description: Optimus Prime leads the Autobots in a darker, action-packed battle against Megatron while secretly protecting Earth alongside a group of human allies.

title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
description: The Autobots uncover a hidden Cybertronian secret linked to the Moon landing, sparking a global conflict that threatens humanity’s survival.

title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
description: Years after Chicago’s destruction, a mechanic and his daughter become entangled in a new conflict involving hunted Autobots, human conspiracies, and the powerful Dinobots.
